canonical_definition: Human Preference Score v2, a reward model trained on the HPD v2 dataset, used as a state-of-the-art baseline for comparison.
papers: Multimodal Large Language Models Make Text-to-Image Generative Models Align Better

definitions.text: Human Preference Score v2, a reward model trained on the HPD v2 dataset, used as a state-of-the-art baseline for comparison.
definitions.paper: Multimodal Large Language Models Make Text-to-Image Generative Models Align Better

definitions.text: An evaluation metric based on a model trained to predict human preferences, used to quantify the aesthetic and prompt-alignment quality of generated images.

characterization: Human Preference Score v2, a reward model trained on the HPD v2 dataset, used as a state-of-the-art baseline for comparison.

neurips24: Multimodal Large Language Models Make Text-to-Image Generative Models Align Better
